<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512">

    <polygon points="220,215 260,170 295,205 245,210" fill="#5b6a70" opacity="0.95"/>

    <!-- mouth (dark) and teeth -->

      <path d="M185 292 L195 307 L180 307 Z"/>

    <!-- eye with highlight -->

    <circle cx="181" cy="241" r="3" fill="#ffffff" opacity="0.9"/>

    <!-- gill slits -->

      <path d="M210 265 Q230 270 255 267"/>
      <path d="M220 280 Q240 285 265 282"/>

    <!-- bubbles -->
    <circle cx="380" cy="120" r="12" fill="url(#bubble)" opacity="0.8"/>
    <circle cx="405" cy="90" r="8" fill="url(#bubble)" opacity="0.8"/>
    <circle cx="320" cy="80" r="6" fill="url(#bubble)" opacity="0.7"/>
